text: Author: jkois Date: Wed Jun 27 21:03:54 2012 New Revision: 39137 URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/39137 Log: PR: www/168218 Add Tier1 Hosting Solutions to our ISP list. Requested by: Lanny (lbaron att tier1hosting dott net) Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.isp.xml Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.isp.xml ============================================================================== --- head/share/sgml/commercial.isp.xml Wed Jun 27 20:47:00 2012 (r39136) +++ head/share/sgml/commercial.isp.xml Wed Jun 27 21:03:54 2012 (r39137) @@ -741,6 +741,23 @@ + + Tier1 Hosting Solutions + http://www.tier1hosting.net/ + + Tier1 Hosting Solutions provides Fast VPS (Virtual Private Server + Hosting for FreeBSD-AMD/64. All Fibre Backbone Network, running + on Enterprise Servaris Servers. We + use only official FreeBSD Released ISO's for all versions of + FreeBSD. The FreeBSD VPS offered is + KVM Full Virtualization. Tier1 Hosting offers various + capacities to serve most requirements. Tier1 Hosting Solutions + also provides full Dedicated Servers with FreeBSD. + + + TransIP http://www.transip.nl _______________________________________________ svn-doc-all@freebsd.org mailing list http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-doc-all To unsubscribe, send any mail to "svn-doc-all-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"
